title: Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
